prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: LST-URBANPARKINGGARAGE-LRG Product Type: TOY_VEHICLE_SET Brand (from catalog): KidPlay Products Existing Title: Kids City Ultimate Parking Garage Diecast Toy Vehicle Race Car Track Playset, Boys Ages 3-8 Description: Learn to drive and play in the city with the KidPlay Deluxe Urban Parking Garage Set.

This play set comes with 3 race cars and a police car to make sure no one is driving too fast. Kids will love driving and parking the race cars in the multi-level parking garage which comes with an assortment of stickers to designate street signs, shops and buildings.

Additionally the garage play set comes with a fueling station that will ensure the cars stay on the move and entertain your child for hours. This is the ultimate imagination play set with 3 levels of push-around play. The garage features functional parts including ramps and a barricade entrance and exit just like the real thing.

On the back of the box, there is a city skyline scene that can be cut out to set up the city for cruising around at night. This is a great educational toy where kids will learn traffic and city words like "ramps", "levels" and "exit" to describe the garage. This encourages imaginative thinking and creative story-telling. Search Terms: toy vehicle garage kids race cars boys toys diecast truck carrier track ultimate garage tower boys toys 3 4 5 6 7 year old stocking stuffer gifts Features: - Parking Garage Set - Comes with 3 Race Cars & 1 Police Car - 4 Level Parking Garage - Comes with Stickers for Designating Street Signs, Shops & Buildings - Featuring Gas Station Fuel Pumps & Ramps - Entrance and Exit Barriers === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: KidPlay Products 4-Level Parking Garage Diecast Toy Vehicle Set

openai.item_name: KidPlay Products Urban Parking Garage Playset

openai.title_differentiation: 4 Level Playset, 3 Race Cars And Police Car, Gas Station Fuel Pumps, Ramps, Barricades, City Skyline Backdrop
